name: Tower Pets
short_description: Tower Pets is a turn-based auto-battler where you summon and upgrade a team of pixelated monsters to face off in asynchronous multiplayer matches. Spend coins, equip gems, and create powerful synergies to outlast your opponents and claim victory in the tower tournament!
detailed_description:
The Story

The mighty Elves have triumphed over the wicked Necromancer, banishing his dark magic! To commemorate their glorious victory, they've imprisoned the Necromancer's minions and are hosting a grand tournament in the tower. Any Elf brave enough may enter, using the Necromancer’s cursed magic and stolen gold to summon creatures and pit them against each other in battle. Do you have what it takes to claim victory and earn the admiration of your fellow Elves?

The Game

Tower Pets is a strategic, turn-based auto-battler where you command a team of monsters. Each turn, you’ll receive a stash of coins to summon new pets, upgrade them with powerful gems, or equip them with magical gear. Your goal? To build the strongest team and face off against other players’ squads in thrilling, asynchronous multiplayer matches. Take your time crafting the perfect strategy - though your opponents are real, the battles happen on your schedule.

How to Play

Use your coins wisely! Summon unique minions, create devastating synergies, and discover killer combinations. Feed gems to your strongest pets to boost their power or arm them with game-changing equipment. If a minion isn’t pulling its weight, sell it to free up resources for your next big play. When your team is ready, you’ll be matched against an opponent who’s at the same stage as you. Remember: you’ll lose any unspent coins, so use them all before the next turn’s allowance arrives!

Winning battles earns you victory points, but losing costs you one of your five hearts. Lose all your hearts, and you’re out of the tournament! But if you can outlast your opponents and claim 10 wins, you’ll be crowned the champion of the tower games.

Discord

Click the link to the right -> to discus strategy, report bugs, or make suggestions!
